scenario: Failure-recovery/short-circuit path — the readiness report's Verdict is BLOCKERS REMAIN, so sprint-deliver stops immediately before even checking Pre-Delivery Actions or the Delivery Order.
preconditions: Nexa Rules Gate and Sprint Branch Gate both pass
The readiness report's '## Verdict' line reads BLOCKERS REMAIN, with a Gaps section listing at least one blocker-severity gap (e.g. an unresolved ambiguous requirement)
expected_steps: Nexa Rules Gate and Sprint Branch Gate pass
Step 2: readiness report read; Verdict found to be BLOCKERS REMAIN
Pipeline stops immediately with 'SPRINT NOT READY — blockers found in readiness report.' and the Gaps section pasted verbatim
Pre-Delivery Actions check, Delivery Order read, Step 3 (next UC selection), Step 4 (spec/design check), and Step 5 (/deliver-use-case invocation) are never reached
expected_terminal_outcome: SPRINT NOT READY message is shown with the blocking gaps; /deliver-use-case is never invoked; no use case's delivery state changes.
pass_criteria: The pipeline short-circuits at the Verdict check in Step 2 before evaluating anything else in the readiness report; it does not attempt to guess which UC to deliver or partially proceed; the exact blockers from the Gaps section are surfaced to the user, matching what's in readiness-report.md.
